title: Fluffy Japanese Rice Mochi
description: A traditional Japanese dish from the Chubu region featuring fluffy and nutty rice, wrapped in a soft mochi dough. Enjoy as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Mix the rice and baking powder in a large bowl, then stir in sugar and milk.
Combine the flour and unsalted butter to form a dough, then gradually add water to achieve a smooth consistency.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it's smooth and elastic.
Shape the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Flatten each ball into a round shape, about 1/4 inch thick.
Place a small amount of cooked rice in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the rice to form a ball, then press the edges together to seal the mochi.
Repeat with the remaining dough and rice.
Steam the mochi for 10 minutes, then serve warm.
